body:
📦 Authloger – Minecraft Mod

Authloger is a lightweight Minecraft mod that logs player authentication events on servers. It helps server owners and administrators track player join activities and monitor authentication-related actions in real time.

Designed for Fabric, this mod runs efficiently with minimal performance impact while providing useful logging features for moderation and server management.

✨ Features

- 🔐 Logs player authentication events

- 🧾 Displays login activity in server logs

- ⚡ Lightweight and optimized for performance

- 🛠 Helpful for server admins and moderation

- 🧩 Compatible with Fabric mod loader

- Per Server Per Password

📋 Requirements

Minecraft: Any

Mod Loader: Fabric

Fabric API: Recommended

👤 Author

Developed by PojavPulse
